about.name: Đỗ Cao Minh - Jason
about.title: QA/QC Engineer
about.bio: I have over 2 years of experience in the QA/QC field, working with AI and automation testing.

ai.title: AI

qa.title: QA & QC
qa.desc: Analyst Documentation, Manual testing, API testing and E2E testing.

sql.title: SQL
sql.desc: Testing SQL databases and ensuring the quality of the data.

bullets: Review documents and consultant solutions for BA and customers.
Manual web testing and database validation with DBeaver across multiple invoice providers and consumers.
Create test plans, log bugs in Azure DevOps, daily reporting, scheduling, and quality management.
Ensure smooth integration with other applications in the internal travel ecosystem.
Apply Gen AI to generate test cases and analyze user stories.
Self-learn and progressively roll out the company's first automation testing project.
Worked with Vietnam Airlines, VietJet Air, and GDS providers to build an API hub for OTA–airline booking integration.
Create test plans, log bugs in Azure DevOps, daily reporting, scheduling, and quality management.
Implement data-driven testing automation with Apidog for reliable, scalable airline booking flows.
Built Flight API Hub technical documentation with Docusaurus, AI MCP server, and Gen AI for developers and integrators.
Collected requirements, elicited business rules, and communicated directly with clients as a BA.
Met directly with customers to gather requirements.
Reviewed documents and consultant solutions for BA.
Logged bugs in Azure DevOps, daily reporting, scheduling, and quality management.
Manually tested features to ensure the application worked smoothly.
Developed highly performant API system using .NET Core API with N-Tier architecture.
Acted as both developer and QC, maintaining ~90% unit-test coverage with NUnit.
Tested APIs at unit, integration, and system levels.
Became a trusted advisor, providing direct business insights to partners.
